name: find
description: Search for files in a directory hierarchy

options.name: -name
options.description: Match files by name (case-sensitive glob pattern)

options.name: -iname
options.description: Match files by name (case-insensitive glob pattern)

options.name: -type
options.description: Match by file type

options.name: -exec
options.description: Execute a command on each matched file

options.name: -print
options.description: Print the full file name followed by a newline

options.name: -print0
options.description: Print the full file name followed by a null character

options.name: -delete
options.description: Delete matched files

options.name: -maxdepth
options.description: Descend at most N levels of directories

options.name: -mindepth
options.description: Do not apply tests or actions at levels less than N

options.name: -mtime
options.description: File was modified N*24 hours ago

options.name: -mmin
options.description: File was modified N minutes ago

options.name: -size
options.description: File uses N units of space

options.name: -path
options.description: Match against the full path (case-sensitive glob)

options.name: -regex
options.description: Match the full path against a regular expression

options.name: -perm
options.description: Match by file permissions

options.name: -user
options.description: Match by file owner

options.name: -group
options.description: Match by file group

options.name: -empty
options.description: Match empty files and directories

options.name: -newer
options.description: Match files modified more recently than the given file

options.name: -not
options.description: Negate the following test

options.name: -or
options.description: Logical OR between tests

options.name: -and
options.description: Logical AND between tests

options.name: -prune
options.description: Do not descend into the current directory

options.name: -ls
options.description: List current file in ls -dils format

options.name: -execdir
options.description: Like -exec but the command is run from the subdirectory containing the matched file
